text: ... Oh, during a flare-up, what should I eat? Well, during a flare-up, sometimes some gastroenterologists recommend fiber-free diets. But that's just because fiber can, can, well, make you go to the toilet more. But in truth, there isn't really a specific diet to follow. I think you should still keep eating and... avoid foods that are nevertheless pro-inflammatory when you have a flare-up. So sodas, alcohol cause diarrhea. Things like that. ... ... ... ...

row.text: ... Oh, during a flare-up, what should I eat? Well, during a flare-up, sometimes some gastroenterologists recommend fiber-free diets. But that's just because fiber can, can, well, make you go to the toilet more. But in truth, there isn't really a specific diet to follow. I think you should still keep eating and... avoid foods that are nevertheless pro-inflammatory when you have a flare-up. So sodas, alcohol cause diarrhea. Things like that. ... ... ... ...
